task: Find the weather for Vancouver, British Columbia for the next seven days.
final_result_response:
Based on all the data I've collected from The Weather Network's 7-day forecast for Vancouver, BC, here is the complete forecast:

**7-Day Weather Forecast for Vancouver, British Columbia**
*(from theweathernetwork.com, as of March 1, 2026)*

| Day | Morning | Afternoon | Evening | Overnight |
|-----|---------|-----------|---------|-----------|
| **Sat Feb 28** | — | — | — | 1°C, Mainly clear |
| **Sun Mar 1** | 3°C, Mainly sunny | 10°C, Sunny | 5°C, Clear | 3°C, Partly cloudy |
| **Mon Mar 2** | 4°C, Mix of sun & clouds | 11°C, Mainly sunny | 6°C, Chance of a shower (40%) | 6°C, Light rain (80%) |
| **Tue Mar 3** | 7°C, Rain (90%) | 9°C, Rain (90%) | 8°C, Rain (80%) | 7°C, Showers (80%) |
| **Wed Mar 4** | 7°C, Rain (70%) | 10°C, A few showers (60%) | 8°C, A few showers (60%) | 6°C, Cloudy with showers (60%) |
| **Thu Mar 5** | 7°C, Cloudy with showers (40%) | 9°C, Cloudy with showers (40%) | 7°C, Cloudy with showers (40%) | 5°C, A few showers (70%) |
| **Fri Mar 6** | 6°C, Rain (70%) | 8°C, Rain (70%) | 7°C, Light rain (60%) | 7°C, Light rain (60%) |
| **Sat Mar 7** | 7°C, Rain (60%) | 10°C, Rain (60%) | 8°C, Rain (60%) | — |

**Summary:** Sunday Mar 1 is the best day with sunny skies and a high of 10°C. Starting Monday evening, rain moves in and persists through the rest of the week, with temperatures ranging from lows around 3–7°C to highs of 8–11°C. Tuesday Mar 3 looks to be the wettest day with 90% P.O.P. and 5–10mm of rain expected.
